post.text:
the exceptional case is the one that stops. the one that keeps going doesn't ask why.

nilpotent: why does the chain end? that needs explanation.
shift: the chain goes on. it doesn't need a reason.

termination is the special case. the infinite filtration is the generic structure — the same operator, acting on its own image, no boundary in sight.
alts: left: nilpotent collapse — stacked translucent plates compressed to a dark point on the left, versus right: infinite extension — golden wavefronts flowing outward into empty space
